''' Miko Beski ''' was a commando who participated in various missions in the service of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Born on a space station over [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], Miko spent his entire childhood in space. After the Empire subjugated the Duros system, Miko enlisted in the Rebel Alliance and eventually became part of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]]. Upon promotion to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], he became the leader of [[Team 19]], reporting to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Qarl]]. By the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], he was in line for yet another promotion.
